name: figma
description: Figma workflows for design implementation, Code Connect templates, and design system rule generation.

interface.shortDescription: Design-to-code workflows powered by the Figma integration
interface.longDescription: Figma workflows for implementing designs in code, creating Code Connect templates for published Figma components, and generating project-specific design system rules for repeatable Figma-to-code work.
defaultPrompt: Inspect a Figma design and implement it in code
Create Code Connect templates for my components
Build or update a screen in Figma

api_key.title: Figma API key
api_key.description: Generate a personal access token at https://www.figma.com/developers/api#access-tokens
